method: Installed release/Forge-0.3.0-x64-setup.exe with /S into the current user's Programs directory, launched the installed Forge.exe with a remote debugging port, and verified the installed renderer/preload IPC against .tmp-test/installer-smoke-project. The checked flows covered app launch, project scan, file preview, safe command execution, diff preview reject and write acceptance, Git status diff visibility, and deleteFile blocking without typed confirmation.
